title: MacFlags
body:
## **MacFlags** Just some Worldguard flags I think are useful. ## **Flags** * ### `cactus-damage` (Prevents damage done by Cactus) * ### `armor-stand-interact` (Prevents interacting with armor stands) * ### `sweet-berry-damage` (Prevents damage done by Sweet Berry Bushes) * ### `allow-riptide` (Prevents the use of the riptide enchantment) * ### `allow-claims` (Prevents GriefPrevention claim creations) * *This flag is only enabled if the plugin **GriefPrevention** is present on your server.* ## **Installation process** 1. Download [WorldEdit]('https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldedit/files'), [WorldGuard]('https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard/files'), and MacFlags 1. Place all the plugin jar files into your server's plugin directory 1. Restart your server! ## **Have an idea for a flag?** Contact me through discord -> [ajmac]('http://discord.com/users/643604666634076179')
I'll be happy to add any flag ideas. ## **bStats** ![https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/macflags.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/macflags.svg)
